name: Cajun Deep Fried Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the turkey inside and out.
2. Mix 1 part crab boil concentrate with 4 parts water.
3. Combine the dry ingredients with the crab boil solution, adjusting seasoning to taste.
4. Inject the turkey (approximately 2 inches apart) with the mixture using a syringe.
5. Cover the turkey with foil and refrigerate overnight.
6. Heat oil to 350°F. Use a grease thermometer to monitor the temperature; it may ignite if the temperature goes beyond 375°F.
7. Carefully lower the turkey into the pot.
8. Cook for 5 minutes per pound. Check in 1 hour using a meat thermometer.
